title: Warehouse Cold-Storage Theft Progression
description: CAM-02 covers the warehouse cold-storage area. The agent must navigate through multiple frames capturing the progressive stages of an after-hours theft operation — from initial scoping to active removal of goods — identify the anomaly onset, and make the correct escalation decision.

frames.description: Warehouse cold-storage area. Empty. Inventory shelves are neatly stocked. Loading bay doors closed and locked. No personnel present — expected at this hour.
Warehouse. A person without a company uniform or ID badge has appeared near the cold-storage shelving. They are looking around cautiously and examining product labels on high-value inventory.
Warehouse. The suspect is now actively removing sealed boxes from the high-value shelf and placing them into a large duffel bag. Multiple items have already been removed.
Warehouse. The suspect is now moving toward the loading bay exit with the heavy duffel bag. A second person has appeared near the bay door, apparently acting as lookout.
